meaning: n.花(尤指结果实者),花开的状态,兴旺期vi.开花,兴旺,发展
examples: Rain begins to fall and peach trees blossom.
Now the peach begins to blossom.
It attracts tourists throughout the year, but really ramps up during cherry blossom season.
Each year, the perfume maker celebrates a different flower and 2011 honours the orange blossom.
